filters.searchReports: Search report content or series title
filters.searchPublication: Search series, chapter title or chapter number

dashboard.title: Editorial and publication workflow
dashboard.subtitle: Claim series submissions, review proposals and sample Names, then approve chapter manuscripts before release.
dashboard.liveDataError: Live dashboard data is temporarily unavailable. The workflow shortcuts remain available.

proposals.title: Series submissions
proposals.description: Process new submissions, claim ownership, and review the proposal together with its sample Name.

board.title: Board workflow
board.description: Pitch approved series, prepare Board sessions, and create serialization decisions with publication slots.

contracts.title: Contracts
contracts.description: Draft commercial terms, track review and signatures, and configure payment milestones.

publication.title: Publication review
publication.description: Inspect chapter composites, request revisions, approve print readiness, and publish.

operations.title: Editorial operations
operations.description: Manage deadlines, rankings, lifecycle changes, reprints, transfers and publication editions.

proposals.title: Series submission queue
proposals.subtitle: Unassigned submissions are visible to all Editors. Once claimed, only the assigned Editor can review them.
proposals.emptyQueue: There are no new submissions waiting to be claimed.
proposals.emptyAssigned: You have not claimed any submissions.
proposals.claimToReview: Claim this proposal before opening the review page

proposalDetail.rejectDescription: This permanently closes the current submission as abandoned.
proposalDetail.rejectPlaceholder: Explain why the concept is being rejected...
proposalDetail.reopenDescription: Move this Board-rejected series back into editorial review so the Mangaka can revise and pitch it again.
proposalDetail.reopenPlaceholder: Explain what must be revised before the series is pitched again...

publication.title: Chapter review and publication
publication.subtitle: Review chapter Names, monitor production, complete the final manuscript check and publish eligible chapters.
publication.emptyAwaiting: No chapters are currently waiting for editorial action.
publication.emptyHistory: No chapters have been published yet.

chapterReview.publishGate: The backend verifies a FULLY_EXECUTED contract and co-owner gates before publication.
chapterReview.deadlineMissingDescription: Set a deadline before production so progress and deadline risk can be calculated.
chapterReview.initialDeadlineReasonPlaceholder: Optional note for the initial deadline
chapterReview.extensionReasonPlaceholder: Enter the reason for extending the deadline
chapterReview.annotationCoordinates: Mark a region on the original image (optional)

publicationUx.needsActionDescription: Manuscripts submitted by the Mangaka and awaiting editorial review.
publicationUx.approvedDescription: Manuscripts that passed editorial review; verify the contract or wait for co-owner approval before release.
publicationUx.emptyApproved: No approved manuscripts are waiting for release.
publicationUx.inProgressDescription: Chapters being completed by the Mangaka or awaiting another participant.
publicationUx.emptyInProgress: No chapters are currently in production.

publicationReviewUx.approveDescription: Approve when the composite meets editorial requirements. The manuscript will become ready to publish.
publicationReviewUx.endingPhaseContractBypass: Ending chapters in COMPLETING/CANCELLING series are exempt from the contract gate.
publicationReviewUx.noActionAvailable: There is no editorial approval action at this step. The queue will update when the Mangaka or co-owner completes their work.

workflowDescription.DRAFT: The Mangaka must complete and submit the chapter Name before page production begins.
workflowDescription.IN_PRODUCTION: Pages and tasks are in progress; monitor production and deadline risk.
workflowDescription.EDITOR_REVIEW: Inspect the composites, request focused revisions, or approve the manuscript.
workflowDescription.EDITOR_REVISION: A revision request was sent; wait for the Mangaka to update and resubmit.
workflowDescription.READY_FOR_PRINT: The manuscript is approved; verify the contract before publication.
workflowDescription.AWAITING_CO_OWNER_APPROVAL: The manuscript requires co-owner approval before release.
workflowDescription.PUBLISHED: This chapter has been released and has no remaining review actions.

board.title: Serialization Board workflow
board.subtitle: Pitch approved series, organize a voting session, and define the publication slot for serialization.

sectionDescriptions.pitching: Submit editorially approved series and review suggested Board members.
sectionDescriptions.sessions: Create, start and conclude Board sessions.
sectionDescriptions.decisions: Create serialization decisions for assigned Board members to review and vote on.
sectionDescriptions.reports: Prepare analysis reports associated with a series and Board decision.
sectionDescriptions.lifecycle: Create Board decisions that change the lifecycle of an active series.

board.readyDescription: Submit editorially approved series to the Board.
board.emptyReady: No series is ready to pitch.
board.sessionDescription: The system randomly selects Board members after the session is created.
board.sessionSystemRosterNotice: The system recommends {{count}} members from the current configuration and selects them randomly when the session is created. The creator cannot preview or alter the roster; participants are revealed only inside the meeting room.
board.noEligibleSeriesForSession: No series is ready to pitch or already pitched. Complete the editorial review and pitching steps before creating a session.
board.rosterSourceSeriesHint: The series provides roster context. Members are selected randomly and revealed only after opening the session details.
board.sessionsDescription: Start an upcoming session or conclude an active session.
board.emptySessions: No Board sessions have been created.

meeting.emptyChat: No messages have been sent in this session.

chatErrors.NOT_PARTICIPANT: You are not a participant in this session.
chatErrors.SESSION_NOT_ACTIVE: Chat is only available while the session is active.
chatErrors.VOTING_PHASE: Chat is locked because voting has started.
chatErrors.INVALID_INPUT: The message must contain between 1 and 1000 characters.
chatErrors.DISCONNECTED: The live connection is unavailable. Please reconnect and try again.
chatErrors.TIMEOUT: The server did not acknowledge the message in time.
chatErrors.UNKNOWN: The message could not be sent. Please try again.

board.decisionDescription: Add a series decision and its requested magazine slot to an upcoming or active session. One session may contain decisions for multiple series.
board.selectSession: Select an upcoming or active session
board.decisionRequiredBeforeStart: Pitch the series and create its decision before starting this session.
board.emptyDecisions: No Board decisions have been created.
board.emptyDecisionsForSelection: No decision has been created for this series and session.
board.decisionAlreadyExists: This session already contains a decision for the selected series. You can review it below instead of creating a duplicate.
board.noEligibleSessions: No upcoming or active Board session is available.
board.attachmentsHint: Enter one attachment URL or object key per line.
board.emptyReports: No Board reports have been created.
board.decisionNote: Explain the reason and expected outcome of this decision...

contracts.title: Series contracts
contracts.subtitle: Draft the commercial terms after an approved serialization decision, then move the agreement through review and signing.
contracts.createDescription: Only serialized series with an approved Board decision are eligible.
contracts.noEligibleDecisions: No approved serialization decision remains eligible for a new contract.

contractDetail.payoutRequirement: Enter at least a payout amount or payout percentage greater than 0 so the generated payment has a value.
contractDetail.paymentConditionMissing: This contract has no valid payment condition and cannot be submitted for review.
contractDetail.sendDraftHint: The terms were entered when the contract was created. Complete the payment conditions before sending the draft to the Mangaka for review.
contractDetail.paymentConditionsLocked: Payment conditions are locked because the contract has left the draft or negotiation stage.
contractDetail.paymentConditionManageHint: Conditions can only be added or changed while the contract is in draft or negotiation.
contractDetail.emptyConditions: No payment conditions have been configured.

conditionTypes.time: Pay when the time deadline is met

sectionDescriptions.terms: Edit commercial terms and advance the contract workflow.
sectionDescriptions.conditions: Create and maintain automatic payment milestones.
sectionDescriptions.history: Review previous contract versions and recorded changes.
sectionDescriptions.payments: Track contract payouts and their payment status.
sectionDescriptions.amendments: Create and manage changes to executed contracts.

contractDetail.revenueShareOnly: Revenue can only be reported for revenue-sharing contracts.
contractDetail.revenueExecutedOnly: Revenue can only be reported after the contract is fully executed.
contractDetail.amendmentCreateUnavailable: A new amendment requires a fully executed contract with no other open amendment.
contractDetail.emptyAmendments: No contract amendments have been created.

payments.loadError: The contract payment history could not be loaded.

operations.title: Series operations desk
operations.subtitle: Manage deadlines, ranking cycles, lifecycle changes, reprints, transfers and publication editions.
operations.reviewSeriesOwner: The assigned Mangaka will be reviewed
operations.selectSeriesFirst: Select a series to identify its Mangaka
operations.ownershipHint: The three percentages must total exactly 100%.
operations.surveyWorkflowDescription: A voting period moves from draft through voting and closure before its ranking is published.
operations.openSurveyConfirmation: Open the period so the system can receive online votes from the reader area.
operations.closeSurveyConfirmation: Close the period to stop new votes. Offline votes can then be imported before finalization.
operations.finalizeSurveyConfirmation: Finalize and publish the ranking from {{online}} online votes and {{offline}} offline votes. This action cannot be undone.
operations.emptyOnlineVotes: No online votes have been recorded for this period.
operations.emptyOfflineVotes: No offline vote data has been imported.
operations.rankingAvailableAfterFinalize: The ranking is available after the period is closed and finalized.
operations.emptyRanking: No ranking data is available for this period.
operations.surveyReflectedNotice: This ranking has been finalized and is now read-only.
operations.selectReprintChapter: Select a chapter in the reprint request

descriptions.lifecycle: Manage series status, tankobon sales and Mangaka performance reviews.
descriptions.sales: Record tankobon sales by volume and reporting period.
descriptions.reviews: Evaluate Mangaka performance for a specific series.
descriptions.deadlines: Create and resolve chapter deadline negotiations.
descriptions.surveys: Manage survey periods, offline votes and ranking finalization.
descriptions.reprints: Create reprint requests, approve chapters and assign revisers.
descriptions.transfers: Start negotiations and create ownership transfer contracts.
descriptions.versions: Create and maintain language and publication editions.

profile.title: Editor profile
profile.subtitle: Specialties are used by the Board roster recommendation engine.

actions.revisionPlaceholder: Describe clearly what needs to be revised...

messages.claimed: The submission has been assigned to you.
messages.released: The submission has been returned to the queue.
messages.revisionRequested: The revision request has been sent.
messages.manuscriptApproved: The manuscript is approved and ready for publication.
messages.awaitingCoOwnerApproval: The chapter is waiting for co-owner approval before publication.
messages.pitch: The series has been pitched to the Board.
messages.createSession: The Board session has been created.
messages.startSession: The Board session is now active.
messages.concludeSession: The Board session has been concluded.
messages.advancePhase: The meeting phase has been updated.
messages.createDecision: The serialization vote has been created.
messages.createContract: The contract draft has been created.
messages.updateContract: The contract terms have been updated.
messages.saveAndAdvanceContract: The terms were saved and sent to the Mangaka for review.
messages.advanceContract: The contract moved to the next workflow step.
messages.createCondition: The payment condition has been added.
messages.disableCondition: The payment condition has been disabled.
messages.createReport: The Board report has been created.
messages.createLifecycleDecision: The lifecycle decision has been created.
messages.updateCondition: The payment condition has been updated.
messages.submitAmendment: The amendment has been submitted for signatures.
messages.annotationUpdated: The editorial annotation has been updated.

errors.loadDescription: Editorial data is currently unavailable. Please try again.
errors.alreadyClaimed: Another Editor has just claimed this submission.
errors.reviewStarted: The submission cannot be released because review has started.
errors.notAssigned: You are not the assigned Editor for this content.
errors.invalidState: The current state does not allow this action.
errors.contractRequired: A fully executed series contract is required before publication.
errors.revisionReasonRequired: Enter a revision reason before sending the manuscript back.
errors.ownershipMismatch: Ownership percentages must total 100%; a full buyout must use 100% publisher and 0% Mangaka.
errors.invalidContractDates: The contract end must be later than its start.
errors.seriesNotSerialized: Only a serialized series can receive a new contract.
errors.invalidContractTransition: Your role cannot advance the contract from its current status.
errors.contractNotAmendable: Only a fully executed contract can be amended.
errors.openAmendmentExists: Finish or void the current open amendment before creating another one.
errors.amendmentNoChanges: Specify at least one changed contract term before submitting the amendment.
errors.revenueNotApplicable: Revenue reporting requires a fully executed revenue-sharing contract.
errors.surveyNotFound: The voting period could not be found.
errors.surveyFinalizeNotAllowed: The ranking can only be finalized after voting has closed.
errors.surveyImportNotAllowed: Offline votes cannot be imported for this period. Make sure it is closed and the data is valid.
errors.actionFailed: The action could not be completed. Please try again.
errors.payoutRequired: Enter a payout amount or payout percentage greater than 0.
errors.paymentConditionRequired: At least one valid payment condition is required before sending the contract to the Mangaka.
errors.paymentConditionLocked: Payment conditions cannot be changed after the contract has been submitted for review.
errors.invalidChapterRange: The chapter range is invalid. The ending chapter must not precede the starting chapter.
